title: How is the best way to integrate monday with other app
excerpt: We started to build our own product to solve some business problem, and really want to integrate with monday for CRM , but dont know what is the best way

posts.author: caobo171 (Nguyễn Văn Cao)
posts.cookedHtml: We started to build our own product to solve some business problem, and really want to integrate with monday for CRM , but dont know what is the best way

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @caobo171 , I am with zzBots, an app integration software. If you are still looking to get your app integrated just reach out to us on our website.

For your app to be possible to integrate with it must have an API.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @caobo171

The best way to connect your new app with the monday CRM platform is by creating custom integration. Being an experienced consulting company, we have dedicated monday.com integrations experts, who can help you create a custom integration for your app. They can tailor the integration recipes based on your business needs and help in the seamless integration of your app with monday.com. Moreover, our experts have previously helped many organizations with custom app integration.

Please reach out to our experts and discuss your project requirements today!
